biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears dark and potentially hydrophobic or overly saturated; no signs of active growth.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-5: Initial state shows a single green sprout in the foreground pot.
temporal_deltas.t-5_to_t-2: Progressive decline of the sprout; loss of turgor pressure and eventual chlorosis.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_current: Total disappearance of the sprout. The biome has transitioned to a state of complete botanical vacancy.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-functional. All registered specimens have suffered total mortality or removal. The environment is currently a 'dead' setup.
anomalies: Presence of white, calcified-looking fragments in the central pot.
Total absence of the Pothos, Mexican Mint, and String of Nickels.
vision_report.narrative_description: Upon meticulous review of the chronological sequence, it is evident that the biome has undergone a total collapse. The earliest image shows a single, fragile sprout, which subsequently withered and vanished. By the current timestamp, all pots are devoid of their intended botanical occupants. The white rabbit anchor remains as the sole occupant of the P3 pot, serving as a silent witness to the systemic loss of the entire collection.
